name: synthetic_notice
label: SYNTHETIC DATA - NOT REAL PEOPLE OR PROGRAMME OPERATIONS

name: consent
label: Do you agree to continue with this fictional practice survey?
hint: Do not enter any real personal information.

name: no_consent_note
label: Thank you. The survey ends here.

name: interview_date
label: Interview date
hint: Use a date from 1 April to 30 September 2025.
constraint_message: Enter a date in the survey period.

name: program_start_date
label: Activity start date
constraint_message: Start date cannot be after the interview.

name: age_group
label: Age group
hint: No exact birth date is collected.

name: participated_training
label: Did the respondent participate in training?

name: training_date
label: Training date
constraint_message: Training must fall between the activity start and interview dates.

name: used_skill
label: Has a skill from the training been used?

name: follow_up_requested
label: Would the respondent like more general information?

name: open_comment
label: Optional comment
hint: Do not enter names or other identifying details.
